sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) dust; so called as being made small, Isa 40:15.

(2) a cloud (Arab. سَاحْقُ a thin cloud; prop. apparently a cloud of dust, as something similar). Plur. clouds, Job 38:37 to which are ascribed showers, Job 36:28 Psa 78:23 Pro 3:20 thunder ( Psa 77:18). Meton. used of the firmament of heaven, i.q. שָׁמַיִם and רָקִיעַ. Job 37:18, “hast thou, like him (God), spread out the sky (שְׁחָקִים) which is firm like a molten mirror?” Pro 8:28 Job 37:21 Deu 33:26 Job 35:5 Psa 68:35 (where, in the other hemistich, there is שָׁמַיִם). So also the sing., Psa 89:7, 38 Psa 89:38. (Sam. שׁחקיה for שָׁמַיִם Gen 7:19.)

I.
